test: H3c — BGC × pathobiont enrichment (genomic mechanism layer)
narrowing_interpretation: AIEC-iron-genotoxin BGC repertoire concentrates on E. coli alone. Other Tier-A core species sit in MIBiG dark matter but carry significant BGC content (E. lenta 41, M. gnavus 58, E. bolteae 18) — their CD-association mechanism is not currently captured by MIBiG-annotated themes.
